name: Ujjwal Bhatia -- real resume, extracted from portfolio/Ujjwal_Bhatia_Resume.docx via python-docx (matcher/resume_extract.py) on 2026-07-20. `skills` below is a manual, honest read of the extracted text -- not automated NER (see matcher/README.md Honest limitations).
raw_text:
UJJWAL BHATIA
Computing Science (AI) Student  |  Aspiring Software / Machine Learning Engineer
Edmonton, AB  •  +1 (780) 709-3479  •  ujjwalbhatia2819@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/ujjwal-bhatia2819  •  github.com/ujjwalbhatiaa  •  Eligible to work in Canada
SUMMARY
Computing Science Honours student (Artificial Intelligence specialization) at the University of Alberta seeking software engineering, machine learning, or data internships. Strong in Python, machine learning, and data structures/algorithms, with a track record of shipping working software end-to-end. Based in Edmonton; open to remote.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS
Concepts: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Debugging
Tools & Platforms: Git, GitHub, MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint), Google Workspace, SEO
Spoken Languages: English (fluent), Hindi (fluent), Punjabi (fluent), French (beginner)
EDUCATION
BSc Honours, Computing Science — Artificial Intelligence Specialization	2024 – Present
University of Alberta	Edmonton, AB
Class XII, Science Stream — Distinction	2023 – 2024
DAV Public School	Punjab, India
EXPERIENCE
Teaching Assistant — Introductory Computing Science	Jan 2025 – Present
University of Alberta	Edmonton, AB
Support 50+ students per term in introductory Computing Science and Python, explaining technical concepts in plain language.
Debug unfamiliar errors in real time during weekly lab sessions and guide students through code optimization and algorithm design.
Grade assignments with detailed, constructive feedback and coordinate with instructors to align on course objectives.
Undergraduate Tutor	Jul 2025 – Present
University of Alberta Students’ Union (UASU)	Edmonton, AB
Tutor fellow undergraduate students in courses I have completed, breaking down technical concepts and guiding them through problem-solving one-on-one.
Assistant Regional Coordinator	Apr 2025 – Present
Harrington Housing	Edmonton, AB • Remote/Hybrid
Serve as primary point of contact for residents, resolving 20+ inquiries per week, and coordinate leasing, onboarding, and unit setup while documenting interactions for accuracy and compliance.
Founder, Owner & Operator	Aug 2021 – Jul 2024
Quick-Service Restaurant	Punjab, India
Built and ran a business for three years, managing online sales, purchase orders, and daily operations; trained staff and grew repeat-customer loyalty through consistent service quality.
PROJECTS
Bike-Demand Forecast — End-to-End ML on Real Data  —  Python, pandas, scikit-learn
Built an ML pipeline forecasting hourly bike-share demand from 17K+ real records using a leakage-free chronological train/test split; gradient boosting cut RMSE 71% vs. baseline (R²=0.91), verified by an 11-test suite.
StudyCircle — Study-Group Matcher  —  JavaScript
Designed and deployed a live web app matching students via a weighted multi-factor scoring algorithm and greedy group-formation strategy; vanilla JS, no backend, covered by 32 automated tests.
Neural Network from Scratch  —  Python, NumPy
Implemented a neural network (forward pass, backpropagation, SGD with momentum) from scratch with NumPy; verified correctness via numerical gradient checking and reached 97%+ accuracy on non-linear data.
Resume ↔ Job-Description Matcher  —  Python, NLP
Built a dependency-free NLP tool scoring resume-to-job-description fit with a from-scratch TF-IDF and cosine-similarity engine plus alias-aware skill-gap detection; backed by a 19-test suite.
LEADERSHIP & ACHIEVEMENTS
Elected Head Boy and Deputy Head Boy (student government, 2022–2024); 2nd prize, Interschool Entrepreneurship Competition (₹11,000 award).
Regional 1st prize and national consolation prize, CBSE Science Exhibitions; CPR / First Aid / AED certified.
experience_level: Undergraduate student (BSc Honours Computing Science, AI specialization, University of Alberta, 2024-present), seeking software engineering / machine learning / data internships. Teaching Assistant and peer-tutoring experience; several independently-built and tested ML/software projects; no full-time industry software role yet.
